column3: Number of squares, each representing 5,000 people (=ROUND(statistic/5000))

column6: The number of registered voters differs slightly from source to source. Eg: BBC lists 48,208,743, while the constituency results file on the House of Commons website suggests the total electorate was 48,224,212. With rounding, if either of these numbers are used the result is still a 98 by 98 square.
